mapper.sql: id, product_code, product_name, product_unit, industry_code, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_product WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM bs_product WHERE industry_code = #{industryCode} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_product ( product_code, product_name, product_unit, industry_code, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productUnit}, #{industryCode}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_product
update_time = NOW(), product_name = #{productName}, product_unit = #{productUnit}, industry_code = #{industryCode}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_product SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
